resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def subtractProductAndSum(self, n: int) -> int:
        prod, sm = 1, 0
        while n:
            d = n % 10
            prod *= d
            sm += d
            n //= 10
        return prod - sm
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Single pass over each digit of n using modulo and division; constant extra space and minimal arithmetic operations.
